title: Enna Solla Pora Lyrics Venghai Song Lyrics

Song: Yenna Solla Pore

Unna mattum nenjukula, vachirika intha pulla
veenaga ivan manasa killatha
3 maasam 6 maasam kaathirikum paya pulla
neeyaga ivan manasa killatha
ne kollatha..ohh.. kollathe

[Enna solla pora ne enna solla pora
Eppa solla pora ne eppo solla pora ](2)

kathirupen kathirupen 6 maasam thaan
kan mulichu paduthirundha 3 maasam thaan
Ennamo nadakuthu, idhayam valikuthu 
Manasu thavikuthu,Unnnodaya vaarthaikaaga

Enna solla pora ne enna solla pora
Eppa solla pora ne eppo solla pora

Unna mattum nenjukula, vachirika intha pulla
veenaga ivan manasa killatha ..killatha
3 maasam 6 maasam kaathirikum paya pulla
neeyaga ivan manasa killatha.. killatha

Chinna pulla nesam ithu, Pacha pulla paasam ithu
Yen manasa thaakiyathu, Munnala Munnala
Jathi matham paakalaye, sammathatha kekalaye
kadhalunu aayiruchu, thannala thannala
nesama nesama, 
nenjukule naan azhuthen, unnodaya vaarthaikaaga

Enna solla pora ne enna solla pora
Eppa solla pora ne eppo solla pora
Unna mattum nenjukula, vachirika intha pulla...

oh..
vettaruva thookikittu, vetti paya polirunthen
Vekka pattu naan nadandhen unnala unnala
katma kamba tthukikittu, kandapadi na thirinjen
kattupattu nan nadandhen, pinnala un pinaala
puthusa puthusa, 
maariruken theriruken unnodaya paarvaiyala
Enna solla pora ne enna solla pora
Eppa solla pora ne eppo solla pora

Unna mattum nenjukula, vachirika intha pulla
veenaga ivan manasa killatha ..killatha
3 maasam 6 maasam kaathirikum paya pulla
neeyaga ivan manasa kollatha..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the playful and carefree attitude of youth, highlighting themes of love and longing.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Venghai, the song showcases a lively celebration, reflecting the protagonist's joyful moments amidst the storyline.

Who are the artists involved in this song?

The song features vocals by MLR Karthikeyan and is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with lyrics by Hari.

When was the song released?

Enna Solla Pora was released on June 11, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Enna Solla Pora, the vibrant energy of the song reflects the carefree spirit of youth, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. The catchy beats and playful lyrics convey a sense of joy and excitement, resonating with listeners. As the characters in Venghai revel in their moments, the song encapsulates the essence of love and fun. This lively track is sure to evoke happiness and get everyone dancing.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Enna Solla Pora from Venghai is a vibrant dance number that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With MLR Karthikeyan's lively vocals and Devi Sri Prasad's catchy composition, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious energy and rhythmic beats that make this track a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Just you in my heart, this boy is restless for three months, six months waiting, you are the one who makes his heart restless, don't let it happen.. ohh.. don't let it happen.
What should I say to you, what should I say to you? When should I say to you, when will I say to you?
I am waiting, I am waiting, for six months it has been hidden and kept, for three months it has been happening, my heart is beating, my mind is troubled, for your words.
What should I say to you, what should I say to you? When should I say to you, when will I say to you?
Just you in my heart, this boy is restless.. restless for three months, six months waiting, you are the one who makes his heart restless.. restless.

This little boy's love is here, this green boy's affection is here. My heart is troubled, in front of me, in front of me, caste and religion are not seen, I don't ask for agreement, love has become a thousand, I cried in my heart for your words.
What should I say to you, what should I say to you? When should I say to you, when will I say to you? Just you in my heart, this boy...

Oh.. I was thrown away, I was like a useless boy. I walked with a burden, with you, with you, I took the burden, I realized it, I walked with you, later I changed, I understood, with your gaze, what should I say to you, what should I say to you? When should I say to you, when will I say to you?
Just you in my heart, this boy is restless.. restless for three months, six months waiting, you are the one who makes his heart restless.. don't let it happen.. don't let it happen.
